zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut於大約1141年2月出生在比利時海瑙特蒙斯時，她的父親Baudouin IV de Hainaut32歲，母親Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut24歲。她於1160年與Raoul Ier de Coucy在比利時海瑙特蒙斯結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1179年1月在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯勞享年38歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut于大约1141年2月出生在比利时海瑙特蒙斯时，她的父亲Baudouin IV de Hainaut32岁，母亲Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut24岁。她于1160年与Raoul Ier de Coucy在比利时海瑙特蒙斯结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1179年1月在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯勞享年38岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: dite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dyte
meanings: English: nickname, perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English * dight, a side-form of Middle English dought ‘brave, valiant’, and possibly derived therefore from a shortened form of Old English dyhtig, dohtig ‘doughty’. Compare Doughty .

nameMeanings.name: 'la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut was born about February 1141, in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, was 32 and her mother, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, was 24. She married Raoul Ier de Coucy in 1160, in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died about January 1179, in Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 38, and was buried in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut est née environ février 1141, à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul Ier de Coucy en 1160, à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ janvier 1179, à Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut um Februar 1141 in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin IV de Hainaut 32 und ihre Mutter Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut 24. Sie hat 1160 in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien Raoul Ier de Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb um Januar 1179 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut è nata il circa febbraio 1141 nel Mons, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Raoul Ier de Coucy nel 1160, nel Mons, Hainaut, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì circa gennaio 1179, nel Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainautが約1141年2月にベルギーヘイナトモンスで生まれた時，父Baudouin IV de Hainautは32歳，母Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainautは24歳であった。1160年にベルギーヘイナトモンスでRaoul Ier de Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1179年1月にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンラオンで38歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut(이)가 대략 1141년 2월 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin IV de Hainaut(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1160년 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에서 Raoul Ier de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1179년 1월 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 라에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에 묻혔다.

mg.ABT FEB 1141–ABT JAN 1179: tany ho any amin'ny febroary 1141–tany ho any amin'ny janoary 1179

mn.ABT FEB 1141–ABT JAN 1179: ойролцоогоор 1141 оны Хоёрдугаар сар–ойролцоогоор 1179 оны Нэгдүгээр сар

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut nasceu aproximadamente fevereiro de 1141, em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul Ier de Coucy em 1160, em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente janeiro de 1179, em Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut родилась около февраль 1141 г. в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Baudouin IV de Hainaut было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul Ier de Coucy в 1160 г. в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла около январь 1179 г. в местности лаон, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

sm.ABT FEB 1141–ABT JAN 1179: e tusa o le Fepuari 1141–e tusa o le Ianuari 1179

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut nació aproximadamente febrero de 1141, en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin IV de Hainaut, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice de Namur comtesse de Hainaut, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Raoul Ier de Coucy en 1160, en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente enero de 1179, en Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
